core.subscription.last_validation_check_: This date represents last day on which license was validated by Zextras Subscription Serviço. Since este is a Pay Per Use (PPU) subscription, system automatically reports daily usage data para Zextras Subscription Serviço. No user action is required as long as communication is functioning correctly. If system is unable para contact service, a 7-day grace period is applied. This grace period is automatically renewed each time Zextras Subscription Serviço is successfully contacted.
core.subscription.modal.confirm: Tem certeza de que deseja proceed?
core.subscription.modal.label: Deactivate Token
core.subscription.modal.warning: You are trying para deactivate current token.Doing so will disable all enabled features.
core.subscription.next_validation_deadli: This date represents last day license will remain fully functional if usage data is not sent para Zextras Subscription Serviço. Since este is a Pay Per Use (PPU) subscription, system automatically reports daily usage data para Zextras Subscription Serviço. No user action is required as long as communication is functioning correctly. If system is unable para contact service, a 7-day grace period is applied. This grace period is automatically renewed each time Zextras Subscription Serviço is successfully contacted.
